3315860.name: Solnox - Grimoire of Seasons Demo
3315860.description:
You are the last force standing between the encroaching Last Season and what remains of this world. Build your perfect deck, master synergies, and fight back against the encroaching Last Season. Choose your Warden and channel their unique rune stone deck to stand against unholy creatures threatening the last remnants of the world.

Spring, Summer, Autumn, Winter - each season carries its own distinct power, capable of shaping the battlefield in unique ways. Use seasonal runes to manipulate terrain, boost abilities, and weaken enemies, while creating devastating synergies. But beware—the Last Season is relentless, and your foes already consumed by it wield their own devastating abilities to ensure your downfall. Adapt, strategize, and save what remains of the dying world.

The land of Ecendael was once a thriving nation, safeguarded by the Wardens of Change. That was, until  Morrigan the Unfading, once a Warden herself, betrayed the order and unleashed the Last Season—a plague of stagnation that drains life, warps minds, and spreads unstoppable corruption. Armed with the last remnants of seasonal magic, the surviving Wardens must reclaim their lost power and push back against the corruption that has ravaged their land. Each Warden brings a unique approach to battle, shaping the fight from the very first card played.

The Wardens are the last force standing between corruption and survival. You can choose between three of them, each tied to two unique starting decks with different playstyles. Experiment with different strategies, refine your deck as you progress, and discover powerful new synergies with each run. With every failed attempt, you’ll grow stronger, unlocking new decks and gaining access to even more potent and complex runes.

* Some content in this demo may vary from the final game.

* It is not possible to carry over progress from this demo to the full game.
3315860.supported_languages: 英语, 德语, 法语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
